name: FiscalNote Holdings, Inc.
description: FiscalNote Holdings, Inc. is a leading global provider of policy and market intelligence, combining artificial intelligence, machine learning, and expert research to deliver actionable insights. Headquartered in Washington, D.C., the company offers a comprehensive suite of software and data solutions that help organizations navigate complex legal and regulatory environments. By integrating advanced technology with deep domain expertise, FiscalNote empowers businesses, government institutions, and nonprofits to monitor, manage, and influence policy developments effectively. Its platform serves as a critical tool for professionals seeking to stay informed and responsive in an increasingly interconnected and regulated global landscape.
